commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9802f3838f9ae54d941e5bbcdf17c35ef9d7a6f9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `format: "esm"` and an explanatory comment to `nodeBuildConfig()` in `tsdown.config.ts`.

PR surface: Other +6. Total +6 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blocker: tsdown 0.22.1 source resolves an unset `format` to `esm`, so this diff's premise is source-reproducibly unproven. I did not run a full packaged runtime repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainer or contributor review is needed to establish the actual package/build root cause; automation cannot safely infer the real document-extract fix from this apparent default-setting patch.

target.title: fix(build): add explicit ESM format to nodeBuildConfig for type module package
target.author: mmyzwl

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
